summary: Tested Kitchen/Bar Print Commands (Comandas) First Exit Bug Fix. Backend API /api/orders/{id}/send-kitchen works correctly - items change from 'pending' to 'sent' status on first call. Frontend code review confirms fix is properly implemented with fallback to orderRef when tableOrdersRef is empty.

tests.name: send-kitchen changes status from pending to sent

files_reviewed.details: Now handles: 1) Empty ref initialization, 2) New orders not in ref, 3) Existing order updates

files_reviewed.description: sendPendingToKitchenSilently - FIXED with fallback to orderRef
files_reviewed.details: Lines 467-471 add fallback to orderRef.current when tableOrdersRef is empty

files_reviewed.description: navigation intercept useEffect - FIXED with fallback
files_reviewed.details: Lines 503-507 add same fallback pattern for navigation intercept
Correctly marks pending items as sent, sets sent_to_kitchen=true, records sent_at timestamp, sends comanda to print queue

send_kitchen_first_exit.details: Backend API correctly changes item status from 'pending' to 'sent' on first call. Frontend fix ensures tableOrdersRef is properly synced and has fallback to orderRef.

comanda_print.details: send_comanda_to_print_queue is called when pending_items exist (line 1144-1149)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Kitchen/bar print commands (comandas) first exit bug has been fixed. The fix involves: 1) tableOrdersRef sync useEffect now handles empty ref and new orders, 2) sendPendingToKitchenSilently has fallback to orderRef.current, 3) navigation intercept has same fallback. Backend API /api/orders/{id}/send-kitchen works correctly.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Kitchen/bar print commands (comandas) not firing on FIRST exit from table screen. Only when re-entering and exiting SECOND time do the comandas fire.
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: tableOrdersRef.current was empty when a new order was created, so sendPendingToKitchenSilently couldn't find orders to send on first exit.
fix_applied: 1. Updated useEffect (lines 261-283) to add new orders to ref even if ref is empty
2. Added fallback to orderRef.current in sendPendingToKitchenSilently (lines 467-471) if tableOrdersRef is empty
3. Added same fallback in navigation intercept (lines 503-507)
bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Backend API testing confirmed items change from 'pending' to 'sent' on first send-kitchen call. Code review confirmed frontend fix is properly implemented.
